title: genista hispanica subsp. hispanica
intro: Genista hispanica subsp. hispanica, commonly known as Spanish broom, is a shrub-like legume plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Genista hispanica subsp. hispanica include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory conditions.
